ConversationCsat.description: Object of customer satisfaction survey data for this conversation
ConversationCsat.title: ConversationCsat

ConversationMetavariables.description: Object of metavariables and their values active during this conversations
ConversationMetavariables.title: ConversationMetavariables

ConversationVariables.description: Object of autocapture and global variables and their values last active during this conversations
ConversationVariables.title: ConversationVariables

_id.description: Unique ID for the conversation record

agent_id.description: The list of unique IDs for agents involved in the conversation

agent_name.description: A list of names of the agents involved the conversation, corresponding to the agent IDs

agent_handle_time.description: Time taken for a human agent to handle a conversation in seconds

automated_resolution_classification.description: Classification of either Resolved or Not Resolved for the conversation

automated_resolution_classification_reas.description: Explanation of the reason for the assigned automated_resolution_classification

bot_handle_time.description: Time taken for the AI agent to handle a conversation in seconds

browser.description: The browser used by the chatter

browser_version.description: The version of the browser used by the chatter

chatter_id.description: Ada ID of the chatter having this conversation

csat.description: Object of customer satisfaction survey data for this conversation

date_created.description: Date and time the record was created (UTC)

date_updated.description: Last date and time the record was updated (UTC)

device.description: The device the chatter used, such as iphone, android, etc.

end_user_id.description: The End User ID used to identify the chatter profile in the conversation.

generated_topic_id.description: The unique ID Ada associated with the generated conversation topic

generated_topic_label.description: The title of the generated conversation topic

generated_topic_v2_id.description: The unique ID Ada associated with the generated conversation topic using Topics V2

generated_topic_v2_title.description: The title of the generated conversation topic using Topics V2

generated_topic_v2_desc.description: The descrtiption of the generated conversation topic using Topics V2

generated_topic_v2_parent_id.description: The unique ID Ada associated with the generated conversation topic's parent category topic. Null if topic has no parent category topic.

inquiry_summary.description: An automatically generated summary of the customer's inquiry

is_engaged.description: Whether the chatter engaged with the bot during this conversation

is_escalated.description: Whether the chatter escalated to a live agent during this conversation

is_test_user.description: Whether the conversation was started by a test user

metavariables.description: Object of metavariables and their values active during this conversations

platform.description: Ada platform through which this conversation occurred

record_last_updated.description: Date and time the record was uploaded to the API

variables.description: Object of autocapture and global variables and their values last active during this conversations

next_page_uri.description: Relative link to the next page of results matching the query

_id.description: Unique ID for the message record

answer_id.description: Internal ID of the answer (response) that triggered this message. Null if the message was not sent by an Ada bot, and None if it was sent by a generative bot

answer_title.description: Title of the answer (response) that triggered this message. Null if the message was not sent by an Ada bot, or if it was sent by a generative bot

chatter_id.description: Internal ID of the chatter who sent this message. Corresponds to the `_id` field of Chatter objects

conversation_id.description: Internal ID of the conversation in which this message was sent. Corresponds to the `_id` field of Conversation objects

link_was_clicked.description: Indicates if the link in the answer (response) was clicked

record_last_updated.description: Date and time the record was uploaded to the API (UTC)

review.description: Rating given to this answer by the chatter

in_response_to.description: Internal ID of the message that this message is in response to. None if the message is not in response to another message

next_page_uri.description: Relative link to the next page of results matching the query
